Short title and comincncemcm.-m(l) These rules may he celled the Cessation of Responsibility (after the ”Termination of Transit) Rules, 1990, (2) ”hey shall come into force on the (late of their publication in the Ollicial Gazette. 2. Definitions—~11] these rules, unless the context. otherwise reqtures :— 0) “Act” means the Railways Act, 1989 (24 of 1.939). (2) “Schedule”, means schedule to these rules. (3) Words and expressions used herein and not: defined but defined in the Act shall have the meanings respectively assigned to them in the Act. _ 3 Cessation of responsibility after termination of trithsit.~~~A railway adu ministration shall not be responsible alter the termination of: transit for the loss, destruction, damage, deterioration or nomdelivery of the goods specified in the schedule. ‘ (No. 89TCHH.llSlltAltlél—See. 99(3)] PRAMOD UNIYAL, Director, Tmliic Commercial.
